metadata.description: Name of the environment that can be used as part of naming resource convention
Primary location for all resources
Name of the resource group to create or use
Name of the Azure Container Registry
Name of the Container Apps managed environment
Name of the Log Analytics workspace
Name of the backend container app
Name of the frontend container app
Name of the virtual network
Name of the Storage Account
Name of the Azure AI Search service
Name of the Azure Cosmos DB account
Name of the Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server used by the full-stack UI
Create a new Azure Cosmos DB account for manifest storage. Disabled by default because VIPER currently does not use Cosmos at runtime.
Create Azure Database for PostgreSQL for the full-stack VIPER UI. Ignored when the frontend is disabled.
Provision the Viper frontend container app. Set to false for backend-only COBRA API deployments.
Azure AI Search index name
Storage container for videos
Storage container for analysis output
Cosmos DB database name
Cosmos DB container name
Azure OpenAI GPT Vision API Key
Azure OpenAI GPT Vision Endpoint
Azure OpenAI GPT Vision API Version
Azure OpenAI GPT Vision Deployment name
Azure OpenAI or Azure AI Services resource ID used for backend managed identity RBAC
Azure Speech Region
Azure Speech use managed identity
Azure Speech or AI Services resource ID for Entra ID authentication
Azure Storage Account URL (auto-generated if not provided)
Azure Search Endpoint (auto-generated if not provided)
Azure OpenAI Key for UI
Azure OpenAI Base URL for UI
Azure OpenAI Version for UI
GPT4 deployment name
Search endpoint for UI
Search API Key for UI
Database connection URL
VIPER UI auth mode. Use easyauth for Azure Container Apps EasyAuth, or anonymous only for non-production local smoke testing.
Comma-separated list of Entra user emails that should receive VIPER ADMIN role on sign-in.
Enable Azure Container Apps EasyAuth on the frontend.
Entra app registration client ID used by Container Apps EasyAuth.
Entra app registration client secret used by Container Apps EasyAuth.
Optional Entra OpenID issuer override. Leave blank to use the deployment tenant.
PostgreSQL administrator login when createPostgres is true.
PostgreSQL administrator password when createPostgres is true.
PostgreSQL database name when createPostgres is true.
Name of the Azure Container Registry
Location for the registry
Tags for the registry
PostgreSQL administrator login name.
PostgreSQL administrator password.
Application database name.
PostgreSQL engine version.
Flexible Server SKU name.
Flexible Server SKU tier.
Storage size in GB.
Backup retention in days.
Allow Azure services to reach the PostgreSQL public endpoint. Use private networking for production deployments that require it.
Tags to apply to deployed Azure resources.
Configure the Container Apps to pull images from the supplied Azure Container Registry during provisioning.
Optional environment variables to inject into the Viper backend container.
Optional environment variables to inject into the Viper UI frontend container.
Optional override for the Viper UI base URL that points to the Viper backend.
Provision the Viper frontend container app.
Enable Azure Container Apps EasyAuth on the Viper frontend.
Entra app registration client ID used by Container Apps EasyAuth.
Entra app registration client secret used by Container Apps EasyAuth.
Optional Entra OpenID issuer override. Leave blank to use the deployment tenant.
Name of the virtual network that hosts the Container Apps environment and private endpoints.
Resource group for the virtual network when reusing an existing network.
Create the virtual network and subnets when true. Set to false to reference existing subnets by resource ID.
Resource ID of the Container Apps infrastructure subnet when referencing an existing virtual network.
Resource ID of the subnet reserved for private endpoints when referencing an existing virtual network.
Address prefix allocated to the virtual network.
Name of the subnet used by Azure Container Apps infrastructure.
CIDR block for the Azure Container Apps infrastructure subnet.
Name of the subnet assigned to dedicated Container Apps workloads.
CIDR block for the dedicated Container Apps workload subnet.
Name of the subnet reserved for private endpoints.
CIDR block for the private endpoint subnet.
Name of the dedicated workload profile used by the container apps.
Dedicated workload profile SKU for the container apps environment.
Minimum number of replicas for the dedicated workload profile.
Maximum number of replicas for the dedicated workload profile.
Enable a dedicated Container Apps workload profile. When false, the apps run on the Consumption workload profile.
Create a new Storage Account when true. Set to false to reference an existing account.
Name of the Storage Account to create or reference.
Resource group containing the existing Storage Account when createStorageAccount is false.
Create a new Azure AI Search service when true. Set to false to reference an existing service.
Name of the Azure AI Search service to create or reference.
Resource group containing the existing Azure AI Search service when createSearchService is false.
Create a new Azure Cosmos DB account when true. Set to false to reference an existing account.
Name of the Azure Cosmos DB account to create or reference.
Resource group containing the existing Azure Cosmos DB account when createCosmosAccount is false.
Name of the Azure Cosmos DB SQL database to create when provisioning a new account.
Name of the Azure Cosmos DB SQL container to create when provisioning a new account.
Partition key path used by the Azure Cosmos DB SQL container.
Default consistency level for the Cosmos DB account when created by this deployment.

containers.name: frontend
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'VIPER_BASE_URL', 'value', if(empty(parameters('frontendBaseUrl')), format('https://{0}.internal.{1}', parameters('backendContainerAppName'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', parameters('managedEnvironmentName')), '2024-03-01').defaultDomain), parameters('frontendBaseUrl'))), createObject('name', 'VIPER_BACKEND_INTERNAL_URL', 'value', format('https://{0}.internal.{1}', parameters('backendContainerAppName'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', parameters('managedEnvironmentName')), '2024-03-01').defaultDomain))), variables('frontendAdditionalEnv'))]

parameters.assignments: [if(variables('hasStorageAccount'), createObject('value', concat(createArray(createObject('name', guid(variables('resolvedStorageAccountName'), parameters('backendContainerAppName'), variables('storageRoleGuid')), 'principalId', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/containerApps', parameters('backendContainerAppName')), '2024-03-01', 'full').identity.principalId, 'roleDefinitionId', variables('storageRoleDefinitionId'))), if(parameters('enableFrontend'), createArray(createObject('name', guid(variables('resolvedStorageAccountName'), parameters('frontendContainerAppName'), variables('storageRoleGuid')), 'principalId', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/containerApps', parameters('frontendContainerAppName')), '2024-03-01', 'full').identity.principalId, 'roleDefinitionId', variables('storageRoleDefinitionId'))), createArray()))), createObject('value', createArray()))]

metadata.description: Name of the storage account to assign roles to.
Role assignments to create for the storage account.

parameters.assignments: [if(variables('hasStorageAccount'), createObject('value', concat(createArray(createObject('name', guid(variables('resolvedStorageAccountName'), parameters('backendContainerAppName'), variables('storageRoleGuid')), 'principalId', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/containerApps', parameters('backendContainerAppName')), '2024-03-01', 'full').identity.principalId, 'roleDefinitionId', variables('storageRoleDefinitionId'))), if(parameters('enableFrontend'), createArray(createObject('name', guid(variables('resolvedStorageAccountName'), parameters('frontendContainerAppName'), variables('storageRoleGuid')), 'principalId', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/containerApps', parameters('frontendContainerAppName')), '2024-03-01', 'full').identity.principalId, 'roleDefinitionId', variables('storageRoleDefinitionId'))), createArray()))), createObject('value', createArray()))]
